name: Founder Performance
tagline: Your performance is the company's ceiling

coreMetrics.name: Deep Work Hours Per Week
coreMetrics.description: Hours spent in focused, uninterrupted work on high-leverage tasks

coreMetrics.name: Decision Quality
coreMetrics.description: Self-rated quality of key decisions made (1-10 scale, reviewed monthly)

coreMetrics.name: Top 3 Priorities Completed
coreMetrics.description: Whether the 3 most important tasks for the week were completed

weeklyRhythm.activity: Weekly review — reflect on wins, losses, lessons, and energy patterns from the past week
Priority setting — define the top 3 priorities for the week and block deep work time

monthlyRhythm.deliverable: Written reflection on biggest wins, failures, and lessons learned
Honest assessment of physical and mental energy with adjustments
Key learnings from books, podcasts, conversations, and experiments
Top 3 goals for next month with success criteria

whatToDelegate.when: When inbox volume exceeds 50 per day
